nasb.text: Give me now wisdom and knowledge, that I may go out and come in before this people, for who can rule this great people of Yours?”

esv.text: Give me now wisdom and knowledge to go out and come in before this people, for who can govern this people of yours, which is so great?”

cnv.text: 現在求你賜我智慧和知識，使我可以領導這人民；否則，誰能治理你這眾多的人民呢？”

ccb.text: 现在，求你赐我智慧和知识以带领他们。不然，谁能治理这么多的百姓呢？”
